title: ctenopteris mollicoma
intro: Ctenopteris mollicoma, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to New Zealand and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris mollicoma lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are often used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming Ctenopteris mollicoma include improving digestion and reducing fever, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris mollicoma include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, but should be used under the guidance of a medical professional.
